pageSubtitle: Pick a LOB, enter the client's phone — same checks as the CTV refer form — then confirm the code.
phoneHint: Checks the client in the selected LOB only (dental or cosmetic).
phoneFirstNotice: Enter the phone number to verify the client in the selected LOB first.
errorClaimed: This client is actively held by {{owner}}.
noClientFound: No client found for this phone number.
createClientBody: This phone is not in the system yet. Enter a name and LOB — check-in will create the client under this CTV.
lookupError: Could not look up the code.
ctvGateBody: You are signed in as a CTV. Log out and sign in with a staff account to verify this code at the desk.
ctvGateLogout: Log out & sign in as staff
